name: deltanet
description: A single-user Pleroma-style backend that federates over chatmail (Delta Chat transport) instead of ActivityPub

comments.deltachat-core-pinning: @deltachat/stdio-rpc-server and @deltachat/jsonrpc-client are pinned to EXACT versions (no ^). The DC core is the federation substrate: upgrading it changes wire behavior, securejoin, and RPC surface, so a core bump must be a deliberate, tested event — never an incidental float. Bump both together and re-run the integration suite.
